rows.result: A trusted individual or community loses faith in you.
An individual or community that depends on you is exposed to danger.
You are separated from something or someone.
Your action causes collateral damage or an unintended side-effect.
Something of value is lost or destroyed.
A new danger or foe is revealed.
It wears on you: suffer -1 Spirit.
Your ship takes damage: suffer -1 ship Integrity.
You are delayed, lose advantage, or are put in a disadvantageous position.
You must act against your best interest.
A surprising development complicates your quest.
Roll twice, apply both results. If the same result is rolled twice, make it worse.
